messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0178",
  "title": "2、数据周期及指标说明",
  "page_index": 103,
  "page_range": "103"
}

Section text:
2、数据周期及指标说明
报告整体时间段 ：2025.1-2025.12；具体数据指标请参考各页标注

message.content: This section answers questions regarding the report's temporal scope and metric reference guidelines. It specifies the overall data coverage period as January 2025 to December 2025. It clarifies that specific data metric definitions are not centralized here but are instead provided via annotations on each respective page. The section contains no tables, figures, standalone claims, or evidence types, serving solely as a navigational directive for interpreting data throughout the document.
